title: Sikh Heritage Month Act
description: Sikh Heritage Month Act (Sikh Heritage Month Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Sikh Heritage Month Act .

provisions.title: Sikh Heritage Month
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the month of April is to be known as “Sikh Heritage Month”.
